evals.prompt: Add a contact form with name, email, and message fields. Name must be at least 2 characters, email must be valid, message must be at least 20 characters. Show validation errors inline.
evals.expected_output: A React component using useForm from @tanstack/react-form, Zod schema, form.Field render props with per-field onBlur validators using formSchema.shape.fieldName, Field/FieldLabel/FieldError/Input/Textarea from shadcn, isTouched && !isValid guard on errors, aria-invalid attributes, noValidate on the form, and a subscribe-gated submit button.

assertions.text: Zod schema has .min(2) on name field
Zod schema has .min(20) on message field
Has isTouched guard before showing errors
Uses formSchema.shape.* for per-field blur validation
Has noValidate on the form element

evals.prompt: Build a form where users can dynamically add up to 5 team members. Each member has a name (required) and a role (select: Engineer, Designer, PM). Users can add and remove members. Minimum 1 member required.
evals.expected_output: A React component using useForm with mode='array' on a form.Field, nested form.Field for name and role sub-fields, pushValue/removeValue array operations, Zod array schema with .min(1).max(5), z.enum for role, SelectTrigger with onBlur, and proper error display.

assertions.text: Has isTouched guard before showing errors

evals.prompt: Create a signup form with email, password (min 8 chars), and confirm password. The confirm password field should re-validate in real time whenever the password field changes, showing a 'Passwords do not match' error.
evals.expected_output: A React component using useForm, form.Field for each field, onChangeListenTo: ['password'] on the confirmPassword field, a validator that reads the password value via fieldApi.form.getFieldValue, noValidate on form, and proper error display with isTouched guard.

assertions.text: Has 'Passwords do not match' error message
Has isTouched guard before showing errors
Has noValidate on the form element
